name: (Former) Bookclub Chicago
content:
I attended one concert at the old Bookclub location, which was a converted studio apartment above a pizza restaurant in the northern reaches of Broad Street. You had to text someone to ask for the address, and the opening to the venue was an unassuming, graffiteed door guarded by a lone trans girl smoking a cigarette. Bookclub was known for punching far above its weight when it came to which acts they booked. Legitimately one of the best nights of my life. I later found out one of my friends and his fiancee had both played shows there with their own bands in the past.
Bookclub has since moved to a more legitimate location, though I have not had a chance to visit them there yet.
